info.name: MetaVox
info.summary: SharePoint-style metadata columns for Nextcloud Team Folders
info.description:
MetaVox adds SharePoint-style metadata management to Nextcloud Team Folders. Define custom metadata fields and edit them inline — directly in the file list.
**Key Features:**
- **Inline grid editing** — Double-click any cell to edit metadata. Supports text, numbers, dates, dropdowns, multi-select, checkboxes, URLs, user pickers, and file links. - **Views** — Save predefined column, filter, and sort combinations as tabs. Switch between views with one click. - **Real-time collaboration** — Cell locking prevents concurrent edits. Changes sync instantly via WebSocket (notify_push). - **Client-side filter and sort** — Instant filtering and sorting with zero server calls. - **AI metadata autofill** — AI reads file content and suggests metadata values. - **Bulk editing** — Edit metadata for multiple files at once. - **Backup and restore** — Automated daily backups with manual restore. - **Flow integration** — Automate actions based on metadata values. - **Nextcloud 31, 32, and 33** support with automatic feature detection.
info.author: Sam Ditmeijer
Rik Dekker
